title: Nearly 91 Lakh Names Deleted From West Bengal Voter List Ahead of Assembly Elections
description: As per official data released on February 28, a total of 63.66 lakh names, around 8.3% of the electorate had already been removed since the SIR process began in November 2025. This reduced the voter base from approximately 7.66 crore to just over 7.04 crore.
